title: Run the contract test and gas suite
description: Compile contracts and run the Foundry/Hardhat tests including adversarial cases and the gas report.
body: Use when validating a contract change. Actions: detect the toolchain (Foundry forge or Hardhat), compile the contracts, run the full test suite including fuzz/invariant and adversarial tests, and produce the gas report; report compile errors, failing tests, and the worst-case gas per function. Do not declare safety from happy-path tests alone; confirm adversarial and invariant tests ran. This skill exposes capability only and must not deploy to mainnet or a public testnet without runtime permission. Validation signals include all adversarial tests passing and gas under the block limit. Risk boundary: if adversarial or invariant coverage is absent, report the contract as unverified and recommend adding attack tests before any deployment.
